---
title: "Our Papers"
toc: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

library(RefManageR)

# Read bib file as text first and strip fields that clutter APA output
bib_text <- readLines("references.bib", warn = FALSE)
fields_to_remove <- c("issn", "url", "urldate", "abstract", "copyright",
                       "language", "file", "shorttitle", "keywords", "note")
pattern <- paste0("^\\s*(", paste(fields_to_remove, collapse = "|"), ")\\s*=\\s*\\{")
bib_text <- bib_text[!grepl(pattern, bib_text, ignore.case = TRUE)]

tmp_bib <- tempfile(fileext = ".bib")
writeLines(bib_text, tmp_bib)
bib <- ReadBib(tmp_bib, check = FALSE)

links_raw <- yaml::read_yaml("links.yml")

paper_links <- list()
for (item in links_raw) {
  paper_links[[item$key]] <- item
}

all_tags <- sort(unique(unlist(lapply(paper_links, function(x) x$tags))))

if (length(all_tags) > 0) {
  cat('<div id="paper-filters" class="mb-4">')
  cat('<strong>Filter by topic:</strong> ')
  cat('<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary filter-btn active me-1 mb-1" data-tag="all">All</button>')
  for (tag in all_tags) {
    cat(sprintf(
      '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary filter-btn me-1 mb-1" data-tag="%s">%s</button>',
      tag, tag
    ))
  }
  cat('</div>')
}

# Sort newest first by default
entries <- sort(bib, sorting = "ynt", decreasing = TRUE)
years <- sapply(entries, function(e) as.character(e$year))

# Sort toggle control
cat('<div id="sort-control" class="mb-3">')
cat('<strong>Sort by year:</strong> ')
cat('<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary sort-btn active me-1" data-sort="desc">Newest first</button>')
cat('<button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary sort-btn me-1" data-sort="asc">Oldest first</button>')
cat('</div>')

cat('<div id="papers-list">\n')

current_year <- ""
for (i in seq_along(entries)) {
  entry <- entries[[i]]
  key <- names(entries)[i]
  yr <- years[i]

  if (yr != current_year) {
    cat(sprintf('<h2 class="year-heading" data-year="%s">\n%s\n</h2>\n', yr, yr))
    current_year <- yr
  }

  info <- paper_links[[key]]
  tags_str <- if (!is.null(info$tags)) paste(info$tags, collapse = ",") else ""

  cat(sprintf('<div class="paper-entry" data-tags="%s" data-year="%s">\n', tags_str, yr))

  cite_text <- capture.output(print(entry, .opts = list(style = "text", bib.style = "authoryear")))
  cite_text <- paste(cite_text, collapse = " ")
  # Clean up any residual LaTeX commands that slip through
  cite_text <- gsub("\\\\textit\\{([^}]*)\\}", "\\1", cite_text)
  cite_text <- gsub("\\\\textless", "<", cite_text)
  cite_text <- gsub("\\\\textgreater", ">", cite_text)
  # Remove "ISBN: ..." or "ISSN: ..." fragments if any remain
  cite_text <- gsub("\\s*ISSN:\\s*[0-9Xx, -]+\\.?", "", cite_text)

  cat(sprintf('<p class="paper-cite">\n%s\n</p>\n', cite_text))

  doi <- entry$doi
  cat('<div class="paper-links d-flex flex-wrap">\n')
  if (!is.null(doi) && nchar(doi) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf('<a href="https://doi.org/%s" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary me-1 mb-1" target="_blank"><i class="fa-solid fa-file-lines"></i> Paper</a>', doi))
  }
  if (!is.null(info$preprint)) {
    cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary me-1 mb-1" target="_blank"><i class="fa-solid fa-file-pdf"></i> Preprint</a>', info$preprint))
  }
  if (!is.null(info$osf)) {
    cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary me-1 mb-1" target="_blank"><i class="fa-solid fa-box-open"></i> OSF</a>', info$osf))
  }
  if (!is.null(info$github)) {
    cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary me-1 mb-1" target="_blank"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i> GitHub</a>', info$github))
  }
  if (!is.null(info$media)) {
    for (m in info$media) {
      cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary me-1 mb-1" target="_blank"><i class="fa-solid fa-newspaper"></i> Media</a>', m))
    }
  }
  cat('\n</div>\n')
  cat('<hr class="paper-sep">\n')
  cat('</div>\n')
}

cat('</div>\n')
```

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var filterButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn');
  var sortButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.sort-btn');
  var container = document.getElementById('papers-list');

  function applyFilter() {
    var activeFilter = document.querySelector('.filter-btn.active');
    var tag = activeFilter ? activeFilter.getAttribute('data-tag') : 'all';
    var papers = document.querySelectorAll('.paper-entry');
    var headings = document.querySelectorAll('.year-heading');

    papers.forEach(function(paper) {
      if (tag === 'all') {
        paper.style.display = '';
      } else {
        var tags = paper.getAttribute('data-tags').split(',');
        paper.style.display = tags.indexOf(tag) !== -1 ? '' : 'none';
      }
    });

    headings.forEach(function(heading) {
      var year = heading.getAttribute('data-year');
      var yearPapers = document.querySelectorAll('.paper-entry[data-year="' + year + '"]');
      var anyVisible = false;
      yearPapers.forEach(function(p) {
        if (p.style.display !== 'none') anyVisible = true;
      });
      heading.style.display = anyVisible ? '' : 'none';
    });
  }

  function sortPapers(order) {
    var items = Array.from(container.children);
    var yearGroups = {};

    items.forEach(function(el) {
      var year = el.getAttribute('data-year');
      if (!year) return;
      if (!yearGroups[year]) yearGroups[year] = { heading: null, papers: [] };
      if (el.classList.contains('year-heading')) {
        yearGroups[year].heading = el;
      } else {
        yearGroups[year].papers.push(el);
      }
    });

    var sortedYears = Object.keys(yearGroups).sort(function(a, b) {
      return order === 'desc' ? b - a : a - b;
    });

    sortedYears.forEach(function(year) {
      var group = yearGroups[year];
      if (group.heading) container.appendChild(group.heading);
      group.papers.forEach(function(p) { container.appendChild(p); });
    });

    applyFilter();
  }

  filterButtons.forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
      filterButtons.forEach(function(b) {
        b.classList.remove('active', 'btn-primary');
        b.classList.add('btn-outline-primary');
      });
      this.classList.add('active', 'btn-primary');
      this.classList.remove('btn-outline-primary');
      applyFilter();
    });
  });

  sortButtons.forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
      sortButtons.forEach(function(b) {
        b.classList.remove('active', 'btn-primary');
        b.classList.add('btn-outline-primary');
      });
      this.classList.add('active', 'btn-primary');
      this.classList.remove('btn-outline-primary');
      sortPapers(this.getAttribute('data-sort'));
    });
  });
});
</script>
